iteration_133_actions.description: Swarm iteration 133 - Fixed redhat-ai-workflow CICD tag conflict by triggering repository_dispatch. Confirmed ollama-proxy CICD now passing. All issues triaged. Zero dependabot PRs.
actions_taken: ✅ Scanned all 193 repos for CI status
✅ Confirmed ollama-proxy CICD now passing (was in_progress last iteration)
✅ Diagnosed redhat-ai-workflow CICD failure: release tag v0.0.59 already_exists (race condition from concurrent PR merge runs)
✅ Triggered repository_dispatch on redhat-ai-workflow to start fresh CICD run (run 29677124437 now in_progress)
✅ Verified all 15 open issues have AI responses and labels (0 untriaged, 0 unlabeled)
✅ Verified 0 open dependabot PRs across all repos
⏳ redhat-ai-workflow CICD in progress (from repository_dispatch, will bump 0.0.60 → 0.0.61)
⚠️  dmzoneill/dmzoneill PR #3 still open - non-bot PR, needs owner review
⚠️  ollama-proxy CI workflow still has 298 golangci-lint issues (CICD passes)
